experiences.title: DevOps | Advisor
experiences.description: In this role, I was assigned as an R&D Engineer and Architecture Advisor in developing CI/CD automation using Jenkins and Bamboo. I implemented monitoring solutions using Grafana and Prometheus, and built automated alerting systems through Dynatrace as well as directly on web servers. I containerized web services using Docker and Kubernetes, and contributed to enhancing cloud architecture on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

experiences.title: Software Engineering
experiences.description: I am currently responsible for implementing Claude Code as a personal assistant agent, ensuring that the overall software architecture is robust, scalable, lightweight, and secure against malware threats through proper firewall and security measures. In addition, I am involved in backend development using Quarkus to modernize and refresh legacy Spring Boot services, while maintaining Java as the core programming language. I also initiated and implemented a CI/CD pipeline for internal mobile applications to enable fully automated deployment integrated with GitLab. Furthermore, I ensure the reliability and health of the message broker system, preventing long queue backlogs and maintaining cluster stability and performance. Currently, I am deepening my expertise in AWS cloud architecture, with a strong focus on mastering Terraform for infrastructure provisioning and automation.

experiences.title: Production Support
experiences.description: Responsible for ensuring the reliability and performance of the corporate mobile banking application (PeB Revamp) for both customers and internal users. Designed and maintained the system architecture, including server infrastructure (Linux), Docker, Kafka, and web servers (Oracle, Tomcat). Additionally, collaborated closely with developers to support backend development using Java Spring Boot and frontend development using React.js.

experiences.title: Researcher | Internship
experiences.description: Developed an electric vehicle system based on IoT and Artificial Intelligence. IoT was utilized for real-time monitoring of electrical current and multiple sensors, including obstacle detection, temperature, vehicle speed, and voltage. In addition, implemented AI-based technologies to enable automated control and intelligent decision-making processes.

experiences.title: Operator | Internship
experiences.description: I completed an internship at PT Gemabangun Pronaperkasa (GemaPro), where I operated various industrial machines, including laser cutting machines, CNC machines, routers, lathes, and other heavy machinery. In addition to machine operation, I was also assigned to assembly installation and electrical component setup.

education.title: Master | Computer Science
education.description: Currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Computer Science, with a strong focus on advanced software engineering, distributed systems, cloud computing, and artificial intelligence. Actively involved in research, system design, and practical projects to deepen both theoretical understanding and real-world engineering skills.

education.title: Bachelor of Science | Instrumentation
education.description: Bachelor’s degree graduate in Instrumentation Physics, with a strong foundation in sensor systems, electronics, embedded systems, data acquisition, and instrumentation control. Experienced in designing and implementing IoT-based and AI-assisted systems for real-time monitoring, automation, and intelligent control.

education.title: High School | Electronics
education.description: Vocational high school student majoring in Electronics Engineering, with a strong foundation in basic electronics, circuit design, microcontrollers, and hardware troubleshooting. Experienced in hands-on laboratory work, practical projects, and technical problem-solving.
